youtube_metadata.description: Forgotten tales, dark folklore, Norse, Greek, and Egyptian mythological rules. #shorts #mythology

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: greek god zeus lightning strike sky
fallback_facts.text_block: In ancient Greek myth, Zeus did not create his own signature <yellow>lightning bolts.</yellow> They were forged for him by the Cyclopes as a gift of gratitude for <red>freeing them from Tartarus.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Zeus Lightning Forge

fallback_facts.yt_search_query: norse mythology thor hammer mjolnir metal
fallback_facts.text_block: Thor's hammer, Mjolnir, was forged by dwarves but has a <yellow>defectively short handle.</yellow> The mischievous god Loki shape-shifted into a fly and bit the blacksmith's eye, <red>ruining the final blow.</red>
fallback_facts.title: Mjolnir Handle Defect
